notes:
The game works out of the box, but since it's a bad port, the "advance effects" might not. 
Tweaking the file SplinterCell4.ini inside the system folder, fixes it. 
Search the Ubisoft forums for the tweak guide.
title: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Double Agent®

notes:
The game sorta works out-of-the-box, but without tweaks, the game isn't really pleasant to play. I recommend the Widescreen tweak by ThirteenAG 
 ( https://github.com/ThirteenAG/WidescreenFixesPack/releases/tag/scda ), which allows the game to run in FullHD, in addition to, well, widescreen.
title: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell Double Agent®
